headlines.title: Trump says US-Iran ceasefire still in place after exchange of fire in Strait of Hormuz
headlines.summary: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce, alleging it targeted an oil tanker and carried out attacks on coastal areas. Trump said Iran 'trifled with us today'.

headlines.title: Russia and Ukraine accuse each other of breaching Victory Day ceasefire
headlines.summary: The two sides report responding to hundreds of drone attacks, just hours into a truce to cover celebrations of the Soviet Union's victory over Nazi Germany.

headlines.title: Three dead after volcano erupts on Indonesian island
headlines.summary: Officials had previously issued warnings on climbing the active volcano due to safety concerns.

headlines.title: South Africa president faces call to resign after court ruling
headlines.summary: The Constitutional Court says MPs were wrong to block impeachment proceedings against Cyril Ramaphosa.

headlines.title: Worldwide race to trace passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
headlines.summary: About 12 countries have so far been linked to the hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius, as the UN health agency confirms at least five cases.

headlines.title: UAE reports drone and missile attack after US says it traded fire with Iran
headlines.summary: UAE reports drone and missile attack following US-Iran exchange of fire in the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: A timeline of the cruise ship hantavirus outbreak and when passengers fell sick
headlines.summary: Detailed timeline of the hantavirus outbreak affecting cruise ship passengers across multiple countries.

headlines.title: Starmer says he won't quit after local elections deliver losses for Labour and wins for Reform UK
headlines.summary: UK Labour leader Keir Starmer faces pressure after significant losses in local elections to Reform UK.

headlines.title: Pope Leo asks God to inspire world leaders to calm global tensions
headlines.summary: Pope Leo asked that God would inspire world leaders to calm global tensions and reduce hatred in an address on Friday to mark his first anniversary as head of the Catholic Church.

headlines.title: Iran accuses US of violating ceasefire, US says it carried out retaliatory strikes
headlines.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said the ceasefire was still in effect while Iran said the situation returned to normal.
